---
title: "Sacred and Legendary Art"
---

## Sacred and Legendary Art

**Author:** Anna Brownell Jameson
**Date:** 1848
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

Anna Brownell Jameson, <i>Sacred and Legendary Art</i> 2 vols  (1848), <i>Legends of the Monastic Orders</i> (1850) and <i>Legends of the Madonna</i> (1852) formed a series under the title of the first, with a later volume published in 1864.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
